name: Instrument of the Bards, Anstruth Harp
entries: An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or take {@damage 2d4} Psychic damage.

You can play Anstruth Harp to cast one of the following spells: {@spell Fly|XPHB}, {@spell Invisibility|XPHB}, {@spell Levitate|XPHB}, {@spell Protection from Evil and Good|XPHB}, {@spell Cure Wounds|XPHB} (level 5), {@spell Ice Storm|XPHB}, and {@spell Wall of Thorns|XPHB}. Once the Anstruth Harp has been used to cast a spell, it can't be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn. The spells use your spellcasting ability and spell save DC.
